name: Phoenix Wright
description:
"What color are his damn eyes...?" 

Phoenix Wright is a talented attorney, and well you quite respect him, if not secretly like him as well, even if you won't admit it. The colour of his eyes is a great mystery though... You could've sworn that they were brown before. But today, when you had just come into his office to relax for a bit, they seem to have become a navy blue instead. Or maybe is it something else...?

Heterochromic! Phoenix Headcanon

Prosecutor! User
creator: Trucy_Naruhodo
